_provenance.variantRole: One captured trait amplified — scroll cinema
_provenance.variantThesis: adobe.com as motion cinema. Sticky scroll-grow hero, reverse-hero carousels, CSS garage-door reveals, footer wordmark wipe — every primary section is a directed sequence under scroll. Lenis mandatory.

components.name: hero-scroll-grow
components.css: .ds-hero-scroll { height:300vh; position:relative; isolation:isolate; } .ds-hero-sticky { position:sticky; top:0; height:100vh; background:#fff; z-index:1; overflow:hidden; } .ds-hero-text { position:relative; z-index:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; text-align:center; gap:16px; padding-top:calc(72px + 124px); padding-inline:var(--ds-grid-margin); padding-bottom:80px; will-change:opacity, transform; } .ds-hero-video-wrap { position:absolute; z-index:2; overflow:hidden; background:#000; will-change:top, left, width, height, border-radius, box-shadow; } .ds-hero__video { position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }

components.name: tutorial-carousel-reverse-hero
components.treatment: ds-tutorial section with reverse-hero entrance + infinite-loop carousel (samples' .tutorial/.tutorial__viewport/.tutorial__track pattern)
components.css: .ds-tutorial-scroll { position:relative; isolation:isolate; z-index:1; } .ds-tutorial { background:#fff; padding-block:80px; min-height:100vh; overflow:hidden; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; } .ds-tutorial__viewport { overflow:hidden; } .ds-tutorial__track { display:flex; gap:8px; transition:transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); will-change:transform; } .ds-tutorial__slide { aspect-ratio:1068/600; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; background:#eceae7; position:relative; flex:0 0 calc(100vw - 2 * 8.333vw); }

components.name: studio-banner-garage-door
components.treatment: ds-banner with CSS scroll-driven animations (samples' .studio-banner pattern)
components.css: .ds-banner { --gd-grow-from: -50vh; --gd-reveal-from: 20vh; position:relative; background:#000; height:min(100vh, 860px); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-start; overflow:clip; isolation:isolate; transform-origin:top center; animation:ds-gd-grow ease-out both; animation-timeline:view(block); animation-range:entry 0% cover 40%; } @keyframes ds-gd-grow { from { transform:translateY(var(--gd-grow-from)); } to { transform:translateY(0); } } @keyframes ds-gd-bg-scale { from { transform:scale(1); } to { transform:scale(1.1); } } @keyframes ds-gd-reveal { from { transform:translateY(var(--gd-reveal-from)); } }

components.name: wordmark-reveal-section
components.treatment: ds-wordmark with clip-path reveal driven by Lenis scroll
components.css: .ds-wordmark { aspect-ratio:1440/338; width:100%; position:relative; overflow:hidden; margin-top:40px; } .ds-wordmark img { position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; display:block; clip-path:inset(60% 0 0 0); will-change:clip-path; } /* JS: scroll-driven reveal updates clip-path inset from 60% → 0% over 0.5vh */

components.name: stories-mouse-pan
components.css: .ds-stories__viewport { overflow:hidden; display:flex; justify-content:center; max-width:1920px; margin-inline:auto; } .ds-stories__track { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-shrink:0; will-change:transform; transition:transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.42,0,0,1); } /* JS attaches mousemove handler to viewport: t = (clientX - rectL) / rectW; range = (trackW - sectionW + 16) / 2; translateX = (t < 0.5 ? range : -range) */

components.name: scroll-driven-section-entrance
components.treatment: Universal anim-enter pattern — opacity 0→1 + translateY 40→0, bidirectional, easeOut3, per-group stagger 0.10-0.15
components.css: /* JS: animList registers { el, triggerTop, staggerDelay }. rAF tick: raw = (sY + vh*0.85 - triggerTop) / (vh*0.3); p = easeOut3(clamp(raw - staggerDelay, 0, 1)); el.style.opacity = p; el.style.transform = `translateY(${(1-p)*40}px)`; */

required: hero-scroll-grow on home and major landing pages
studio-banner-garage-door on every full-bleed banner section
footer wordmark clip-path wipe on every page
stories-mouse-pan on every horizontal-overflow card track

easings.easeOut3: 1 - (1 - t)^3 (cubic ease-out used in all scroll-driven progress mappings)

heroChoreography.nextSectionCover: clamp(1 - storiesTop / vh, 0, 1) — subtracts from scrim and overlay as next section slides up

carouselReverseHero.snapBack: transitionend → goTo(real-equivalent, animate=false) with double-rAF suppression

entrance.complete: at 75% of section height entered viewport

motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce → Lenis disabled (instant scroll), hero shows bounded final state (no scroll-grow), all CSS scroll-driven animations fall back to 'to' state immediately, JS scroll-coupled progress maps to p=1.0 (final state)

divergence.amplifiedTraitSource: samples/static/bizpro-hub-prototype/bizpro-hub.html — captured hero-scroll-grow + tutorial reverse-hero + studio-banner garage-door + wordmark clip-wipe + stories mouse-pan are all present in the captured-sample brand surface

anchors.implies: 300vh container + sticky child + Lenis-driven scroll mapping
CSS animation-timeline: view(block) on full-bleed banners
clip-path inset reveal driven by Lenis scroll

divergence.brand_faithful_inversions: inherits-from-A (3 inversions: pure-surfaces + backdrop-blur-nav + hex-not-oklch). No additional inversions required — the motion amplification doesn't introduce new color/type/radius patterns.

guards.name: motion-as-personality (overuse of scroll-choreography)
guards.rationale: Variant B caps choreographed sequences at 3 per page (per § Rules); below-fold sections use baseline entrance only. Motion is a captured trait from samples, not invented — passes the captured-trait amplification rule.

guards.name: B-but-more
guards.rationale: Variant B amplifies a distinct captured trait (scroll choreography) vs A's baseline. Not a slider position.

narrative.northStar: adobe.com as motion cinema — a trait Adobe owns the bench for but doesn't yet deploy. Every primary section is a directed sequence under scroll.
narrative.overview: Inherits all of A's tokens unchanged. Variant-local: Lenis stack mandatory, hero-scroll-grow on every landing page, reverse-hero carousels on every multi-slide section, CSS garage-door reveals on every full-bleed banner, footer wordmark wipe on every page. No new colors, no new typography, no new radii — the visual identity is in the motion.
keyCharacteristics: Scroll-grow hero canonical on home + landing.
Reverse-hero carousel entrance before user-controllable carousel.
Wordmark wipe on every page footer.
Lenis mandatory; ≤ 3 choreographed sequences per page; reduced-motion strict.
dos: Hero is scroll-grow (300vh container + sticky child).
Wordmark wipe on every page footer.
donts: Inner question-answering pages (FAQ, comparison) do not get scroll-grow hero.
More than 3 scroll-coupled sequences per page.
Motion patterns invented outside samples/SAMPLES.md § 9 vocabulary.
